overall.description: First-person exploration of a desert badlands environment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking along rocky terrain overlooking a vast valley with distant industrial towers and an abandoned compound. The scene features warm golden hour lighting over red rock formations and sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert plateau with industrial overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky desert terrain toward the cliff edge overlooking the valley

entered.detail: gravelly desert ground with scattered rocks and sparse grass
industrial concrete structure with metal fencing on the right side of the plateau
tall metal transmission towers visible in the distant desert valley
vast open desert landscape with scattered vegetation stretching to the horizon
large red rock outcrops and cliffs in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert plateau with rocky gravel terrain. An abandoned industrial compound sits to the right while distant transmission towers and red rock formations dominate the horizon. The camera moves steadily forward toward the cliff edge overlooking the vast desert valley below.

events.description: terrain drops away revealing steep cliff edge and valley below

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the cliff edge with the abandoned compound visible to the right

entered.detail: steep drop-off at the edge of the plateau revealing the valley floor below

segments.scene_description: The ground falls away to reveal a steep cliff edge overlooking the desert valley. The abandoned compound draws closer on the right while the camera continues walking forward along the precipice. The industrial towers remain visible in the distant haze as the valley floor becomes more detailed.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path with desert vegetation

events.description: path curves left along the cliff edge passing desert vegetation

agents.ego_description: turning left to follow the narrow cliff path alongside a joshua tree

entered.detail: desert yucca tree growing at the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The path curves left along the cliff edge, passing a joshua tree growing at the precipice. The abandoned compound falls behind as the camera follows the narrow cliffside route. The rocky cliff edge now runs alongside the left side while the desert valley remains visible below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a rocky desert plateau that gradually transitions into a narrow walk along a steep cliffside overlooking a vast valley. It begins on a wide expanse of gravel terrain, moving steadily toward the horizon where distant transmission towers and red rock formations stand against the sky. As the camera advances, the ground falls away to reveal a precipice, bringing an abandoned industrial compound into closer view on the right while the valley floor becomes more detailed in the haze. The scene then shifts as the path curves left, passing a solitary joshua tree at the edge before the compound falls behind. Finally, the camera follows the winding cliffside route with the rocky drop-off now running along the left side, keeping the expansive desert valley visible below.
